title: Croatian Chicken Pasta
description: A simple yet flavorful pasta dish with the addition of Croatian chicken and a hint of sweetness.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
Season chicken with salt, pepper, and smoked paprika.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear chicken until browned and cooked through.
Remove chicken from skillet and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add garlic to skillet.
Cook for 1-2 minutes or until fragrant.
Add cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with garlic.
Return chicken to the skillet and toss with pasta.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
